  • Package
  • Tree

  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Coin
    Represents a collectible coin entity in the game.
    Difficulty
    Enum representing game difficulty levels with associated configuration.
    Direction
    Enum representing the four cardinal directions for movement and determining which sprite frame to use for animation based on the current direction.
    Drawscreen
    Handles all rendering logic for the game.
    EntitySpawner
    Manages the spawning and configuration of all entities (Zombies, Coins, Traps, Food) based on the currently selected game difficulty.
    EscapeGate
    Represents the escape point or exit gate in the game level.
    Food
    Represents a collectible food item in the game.
    GameDimensions
    Encapsulates all game dimension and grid configuration.
    GameManager
    Manages all game state updates and logic for the GamePanel.
    GamePanel
    The main panel for the game, extending JPanel and implementing Runnable.
    KeyHandler
    Handles keyboard input for controlling player movement and game actions.
    launchGame
    Configures and launches the main game loop based on the selected difficulty.
    Main
    Entry point for the ZombieHamlet game.
    MenuPane
    A JPanel representing the main menu of the game.
    MovingEntity
    Represents an entity in the game that can move.
    Node
    Represents a single node (or tile) on the game grid, primarily used for pathfinding algorithms (like A*).
    Pathfinder
    Implements the A* search algorithm to find the shortest path between two points on the game grid, respecting tile collisions.
    Player
    Represents the main player character in the game.
    Position
    Represents a position in a 2D grid using row and column coordinates.
    SoundManager
    Manages audio playback for the game.
    StartPagePanel
    Represents the initial screen shown when the application starts, featuring a single "START" button.
    StillEntity
    Represents a stationary entity in the game world, such as walls, coins, food, or traps.
    TileManager
    Manages the tiles used to construct the game map, handling tile assets, map loading from a file, and rendering the map onto the screen.
    Trap
    Represents a dangerous trap entity on the game map that damages the player upon contact.
    ui
    Main class responsible for setting up and managing the game's graphical user interface (UI).
    UserManualPanel
    A panel that displays the user manual with game instructions.
    Zombie
    Represents an enemy entity (Zombie) that follows the player using pathfinding and inflicts damage upon collision after a cooldown period.
